title: World of Food
description: Adds a world of food to Minecraft.
body:
A mod that introduces a World of Food to Minecraft's limited selection.
Enrich your culinary experience!
Please download it to help my self-esteem.

<font color='green'>You can use this mod in your modpacks.</font>

 

Check the [Wiki](https://github.com/DerpyNinjaFrog/world-of-food/wiki) for all recipes.

 
I would love to hear your feedback!
You can create an issue or discussion on [GitHub](https://github.com/DerpyNinjaFrog/world-of-food).

  

**Version 1.1.0 is now here with more food, more languages, improved textures and recipes, and more!**

 

## Dependencies:
Fabric API



## Current foods:

Apple pie

Biscuit

Butter

Buttered toast

Caramel

Caramel apple

Caramel bucket

Cereal

Cheese

Cheese puffs

Chocolate

Chocolate pie

Cooked egg

Custard

Gelatin

Gelatin dessert

Glow berry pie

Mashed potatoes

Sushi

Nachos

Ramen

Sandwich

Shepherd's pie

Sweet berry pie

Sweet cream

Toast

Tortilla

Tortilla chips
